title: Le Creuset Terrine with Lid – Vintage Orange – Cast Iron – Made in France
description:
Beautiful and classic Le Creuset terrine in the iconic orange color. Perfect for making pâté, terrine, foie gras, or even small loaf dishes. A great piece for both cooking and serving.
Details:
Brand: Le Creuset
Made in France
Material: Cast iron with enamel coating
Color: Classic Le Creuset orange
Includes original lid
Approx. size: 35 cm long (including handles) and about 10 cm wide
Excellent heat retention for slow cooking
Condition: Used but in good condition. Some light signs of use consistent with age, but no cracks or major damage. The enamel interior is clean and ready to use.
Perfect for collectors, home cooks, or anyone who loves high-quality French cookware.
